title: HTML and CSS Integration Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the three ways to style HTML elements using Cascading Style Sheets.

questions.question: Which of these is the MOST efficient and recommended way to apply styles to a professional website?
What is the name of the attribute used to apply an inline style directly to an HTML element?
Which tag is used in the <head> of an HTML document to group internal CSS rules?
Which tag is used to create a link between an HTML document and an external CSS file?
If you apply the same style using all three methods, which method generally has the HIGHEST priority (overwrites the others)?
